attributes.title: [vSphere OTel] Storage
attributes.description: Datastore and VM disk capacity: utilization gauges, space breakdown, and per-datastore trends from the OTel vcenterreceiver.

params.markdown:
## [vSphere OTel] Storage

This dashboard monitors storage capacity and health:
- Datastore utilization gauges per datastore
- Disk space breakdown (available vs used)
- Datastore utilization trends over time
- VM disk utilization and throughput
- Datacenter-level disk space overview

query.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS datastores = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.datastore.name)

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS datastores = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.datastore.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.disk_state == "used"
| STATS used = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.disk_state == "used"
| STATS used = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space))

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization) BY vcenter.datastore.name, vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT util DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization) BY vcenter.datastore.name, vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT util DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.datastore.name
| SORT util DESC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.datastore.name
| SORT util DESC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.usage)) BY vcenter.datastore.name, attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.usage)) BY vcenter.datastore.name, attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space)) BY attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space)) BY attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.datastore.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.datastore.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.vm.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.vm.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.datastore.name, vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT util DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) BY vcenter.datastore.name, vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT util DESC
| LIMIT 20
